title: [InstCombine] Infer sub nuw from dominating conditions

tests.source_program:
; Using nuw inference to eliminate overflow checks
; Summary focuses on abs elimination, not overflow check removal
declare { i32, i1 } @llvm.uadd.with.overflow.i32(i32, i32)

define i1 @overflow_check_elimination(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %x, %y
  br i1 %cmp, label %cond.true, label %cond.false

cond.true:
  %sub = sub i32 %x, %y
  %overflow = call { i32, i1 } @llvm.uadd.with.overflow.i32(i32 %sub, i32 1)
  %ov_bit = extractvalue { i32, i1 } %overflow, 1
  br label %cond.end

cond.false:
  br label %cond.end

cond.end:
  %result = phi i1 [ %ov_bit, %cond.true ], [ false, %cond.false ]
  ret i1 %result
}

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary describes abs elimination optimization; this test demonstrates overflow check elimination using the same nuw inference

alive2.src:
; Using nuw inference to eliminate overflow checks
; Summary focuses on abs elimination, not overflow check removal
declare { i32, i1 } @llvm.uadd.with.overflow.i32(i32, i32)

define i1 @overflow_check_elimination(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %x, %y
  br i1 %cmp, label %cond.true, label %cond.false

cond.true:
  %sub = sub i32 %x, %y
  %overflow = call { i32, i1 } @llvm.uadd.with.overflow.i32(i32 %sub, i32 1)
  %ov_bit = extractvalue { i32, i1 } %overflow, 1
  br label %cond.end

cond.false:
  br label %cond.end

cond.end:
  %result = phi i1 [ %ov_bit, %cond.true ], [ false, %cond.false ]
  ret i1 %result
}
alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

; Function Attrs: nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare { i32, i1 } @llvm.uadd.with.overflow.i32(i32, i32) #0

define i1 @overflow_check_elimination(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %x, %y
  br i1 %cmp, label %cond.true, label %cond.false

cond.true:                                        ; preds = %entry
  %sub = sub nuw i32 %x, %y
  %ov_bit = icmp eq i32 %sub, -1
  br label %cond.end

cond.false:                                       ; preds = %entry
  br label %cond.end

cond.end:                                         ; preds = %cond.false, %cond.true
  %result = phi i1 [ %ov_bit, %cond.true ], [ false, %cond.false ]
  ret i1 %result
}

attributes #0 = { nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @overflow_check_elimination(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %x, %y
  br i1 %cmp, label %cond.true, label %cond.false

cond.false:
  br label %cond.end

cond.true:
  %sub = sub i32 %x, %y
  %overflow = uadd_overflow i32 %sub, 1
  %ov_bit = extractvalue {i32, i1, i24} %overflow, 1
  br label %cond.end

cond.end:
  %result = phi i1 [ %ov_bit, %cond.true ], [ 0, %cond.false ]
  ret i1 %result
}
=>
define i1 @overflow_check_elimination(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %x, %y
  br i1 %cmp, label %cond.true, label %cond.false

cond.false:
  br label %cond.end

cond.true:
  %sub = sub nuw i32 %x, %y
  %ov_bit = icmp eq i32 %sub, 4294967295
  br label %cond.end

cond.end:
  %result = phi i1 [ %ov_bit, %cond.true ], [ 0, %cond.false ]
  ret i1 %result
}

define i1 @overflow_check_elimination(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %x, %y
  br i1 %cmp, label %cond.true, label %cond.false

cond.true:                                        ; preds = %entry
  %sub = sub nuw i32 %x, %y
  %ov_bit = icmp eq i32 %sub, -1
  br label %cond.end

cond.false:                                       ; preds = %entry
  br label %cond.end

cond.end:                                         ; preds = %cond.false, %cond.true
  %result = phi i1 [ %ov_bit, %cond.true ], [ false, %cond.false ]
  ret i1 %result
}
